prediction.reasoning: This prediction is generated by an AI and is not financial advice. It is based on a statistical model, assuming stock prices follow a random walk with no expected drift over the short term (22 days). The point estimate is therefore the current price. The confidence intervals are calculated using an assumed annualized volatility of 20% for CVX and a log-normal distribution for price movements. This volatility is a historical average and actual future volatility may differ significantly. Real-world market conditions, company-specific news, economic data, and investor sentiment are not factored into this purely statistical approach, and actual price movements can vary considerably from these estimates. Past performance or statistical models are not indicators of future results.
